_comment: First batch off the 96-concept queue. Each entry points at a validated spec in tmp/specs/ (generated by `bin/concept-to-spec.py --slug <slug>` against the mockup at docs/mockups/<slug>.png). Intentionally alphabetical for deterministic ordering -- no favoritism, no cherry-picking. Concurrency: 1 because each theme runs `bin/sync-playground.py`, which rewrites every theme's blueprint -- running two in parallel would fight over that file. Use --no-pr on the CLI so the walker stops at green `bin/check.py` and leaves the worktree intact for judgment-pass polish (microcopy, photos, front-page restructure) before a human-reviewed PR ships.
